exercises.sentence: A veces ________ que no me escuchas cuando hablo.
exercises.translation: Sometimes I seem like you do not listen to me when I talk.

exercises.sentence: Creo que ________ un poco cansado hoy, ?verdad?
exercises.translation: I think I seem a little tired today, right?

exercises.sentence: Si uso este sombrero, ________ un detective famoso.
exercises.translation: If I wear this hat, I look like a famous detective.

exercises.sentence: Tú ________ muy feliz con tu nuevo trabajo.
exercises.translation: You seem very happy with your new job.

exercises.sentence: ¡Cuidado! ________ un poco nervioso por el examen.
exercises.translation: Careful! You seem a bit nervous about the exam.

exercises.sentence: ¡Qué bien! ________ mucho más joven con ese corte de pelo.
exercises.translation: How great! You look much younger with that haircut.

exercises.sentence: Ella ________ una persona muy inteligente y amable.
exercises.translation: She seems like a very intelligent and kind person.

exercises.sentence: El problema ________ simple, pero es muy complicado.
exercises.translation: The problem seems simple, but it is very complicated.

exercises.sentence: Ese restaurante ________ excelente para cenar hoy.
exercises.translation: That restaurant seems excellent for dinner today.

exercises.sentence: Ayer ________ muy triste cuando hablamos por teléfono.
exercises.translation: Yesterday I seemed very sad when we spoke on the phone.

exercises.sentence: En la entrevista, ________ muy seguro de mis habilidades.
exercises.translation: In the interview, I seemed very sure of my skills.

exercises.sentence: Al principio, ________ confundido por las instrucciones.
exercises.translation: At the beginning, I seemed confused by the instructions.

exercises.sentence: Ayer ________ muy cansado después del partido de fútbol.
exercises.translation: Yesterday you seemed very tired after the soccer game.

exercises.sentence: Por un momento, ________ sorprendido al verme llegar.
exercises.translation: For a moment, you seemed surprised to see me arrive.

exercises.sentence: Me alegra que ________ contento durante la fiesta.
exercises.translation: I am happy that you seemed happy during the party.

exercises.sentence: La película ________ muy larga durante la función de ayer.
exercises.translation: The movie seemed very long during the show yesterday.

exercises.sentence: Él ________ molesto cuando escuchó las noticias.
exercises.translation: He seemed annoyed when he heard the news.

exercises.sentence: Ella ________ muy tranquila durante la reunión.
exercises.translation: She seemed very calm during the meeting.

exercises.sentence: Cuando era niño, siempre ________ un poco tímido.
exercises.translation: When I was a child, I always seemed a bit shy.

exercises.sentence: Yo ________ mayor de lo que era en realidad.
exercises.translation: I seemed older than I actually was.

exercises.sentence: Antes, ________ que todo era mucho más fácil.
exercises.translation: Before, it seemed that everything was much easier.

exercises.sentence: Tú ________ muy interesado en la historia en ese entonces.
exercises.translation: You seemed very interested in history back then.

exercises.sentence: Siempre ________ preocupada por tus notas en la escuela.
exercises.translation: You always seemed worried about your grades in school.

exercises.sentence: Cuando hablabas de tu viaje, ________ muy emocionado.
exercises.translation: When you spoke about your trip, you seemed very excited.

exercises.sentence: El día ________ interminable mientras esperábamos el bus.
exercises.translation: The day seemed endless while we were waiting for the bus.

exercises.sentence: Ella ________ una experta en arte en esos años.
exercises.translation: She seemed like an art expert in those years.

exercises.sentence: El proyecto ________ bien organizado al principio.
exercises.translation: The project seemed well organized at the beginning.

exercises.sentence: Yo ________ antipático si no saludo a mis vecinos.
exercises.translation: I would seem unfriendly if I do not greet my neighbors.

exercises.sentence: Si no hablo nada, ________ muy reservado.
exercises.translation: If I do not speak at all, I would seem very reserved.

exercises.sentence: Sin mis gafas, ________ que no veo bien de lejos.
exercises.translation: Without my glasses, it would seem that I do not see well from a distance.

exercises.sentence: Tú ________ más profesional con un traje puesto.
exercises.translation: You would seem more professional with a suit on.

exercises.sentence: Sin duda, ________ muy valiente ante esa situación.
exercises.translation: Without a doubt, you would seem very brave in that situation.

exercises.sentence: Si cambias de opinión, ________ muy indeciso.
exercises.translation: If you change your mind, you would seem very indecisive.

exercises.sentence: Esto ________ un buen plan, pero es arriesgado.
exercises.translation: This would seem like a good plan, but it is risky.

exercises.sentence: La idea ________ estupenda si tuviéramos más dinero.
exercises.translation: The idea would seem wonderful if we had more money.

exercises.sentence: El lugar ________ un paraíso en las fotos.
exercises.translation: The place would seem like a paradise in the photos.

exercises.sentence: Mañana ________ más tranquilo cuando termine el trabajo.
exercises.translation: Tomorrow I will seem calmer when I finish work.

exercises.sentence: Con este entrenamiento, ________ mucho más fuerte.
exercises.translation: With this training, I will seem much stronger.

exercises.sentence: Si sigo estudiando, ________ un experto en el tema.
exercises.translation: If I keep studying, I will seem like an expert on the subject.

exercises.sentence: Con ese uniforme nuevo, ________ un capitán de barco.
exercises.translation: With that new uniform, you will look like a ship captain.

exercises.sentence: Cuando practiques más, ________ un profesional.
exercises.translation: When you practice more, you will seem like a professional.

exercises.sentence: Si descansas bien, ________ menos cansado mañana.
exercises.translation: If you rest well, you will seem less tired tomorrow.

exercises.sentence: Todo ________ más claro después de la explicación.
exercises.translation: Everything will seem clearer after the explanation.

exercises.sentence: El problema ________ insignificante en un año.
exercises.translation: The problem will seem insignificant in a year.

exercises.sentence: Ella ________ muy feliz cuando vea el regalo.
exercises.translation: She will seem very happy when she sees the gift.
